name: 37 · xArm Pick (SubWorkflow, Path C Slice 4)
description: Reusable PICK child SubWorkflow for the xArm 6 sample-handling stack. Start.initial takes a grasp_pose, an approach_pose (both geometry_msgs/Pose JSON) and the object_id of the collision object to attach. Body: plan_to_pose to the approach pose (call_service /plan_to_pose) → Decision gate → execute approach (send_action_goal /xarm6_traj_controller/follow_joint_trajectory) → plan_cartesian descent toward grasp_pose (call_service /plan_cartesian, straight-line, self-limited at the sample surface via avoid_collisions so fraction<1.0 is fine) → Decision gate → execute descent → grasp (call_service /grasp atomic close+attach of object_id, now with the gripper aligned over the sample). End maps picked=grasp.success, object_id=input.object_id; either rejected branch maps picked=false. The bridge time-parameterizes the cartesian path so Path B can execute it. LIVE ONLY: requires `just dev xarm-up`.
